LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 13, 2014, TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 27, 2014, AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-13-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS CONTINUED TO JULY 3, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 4, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE PROPOSED ORDER ONLY. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-03-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. MATTER WAS CONTINUED ON JUNE 4, 2014 TO GIVE PLAINTIFF AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B AND DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 BY NOON ON JUNE 4, 2014. PLAINTIFF WAS WARNED THAT FAILURE TO DO SO WOULD RESULT IN THE MOTION BEING DENIED. COURTESY COPIES HAVE NOT BEEN RECEIVED IN DEPARTMENT 302 AND THEREFORE THE MOTION IS DENIED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684.

Brandon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff MIDLAND FUNDING, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant JOHN VO
Declaration of Ruben Garlejo, Jr. pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Principal $4,000.76
Pre-Judgment Interest $460.56
Attorney's Fees are waived.
Costs $426.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $4,887.32
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-08-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is denied. Matter was continued on June 4, 2014 to give Plaintiff an opportunity to comply with local rule 2.6B and deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302 by noon on June 4, 2014. Plaintiff was warned that failure to do so would result in the motion being denied. Courtesy copies have not been received in Department 302 and therefore the motion is denied. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Continued To Jul-03-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to July 3, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 4, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the proposed order only. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Set For Trial On Sep-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 27, 2014, at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported.
